docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-10-2011 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBIT DETAIN BY THE COURT. MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY JUDGE PRO TEM. BETSY JOHNSEN, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (PARTIES STIPULATED FOR JUDGE PRO TEM. IN OPEN COURT)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,400.00 FILED BY JIANG, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT 501 COLUMBUS, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00) SERVED JUN-21-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT 501 COLUMBUS, LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIANG, JENNIFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 501 COLUMBUS, LLC $2,374.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,424.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
